official.name: pyxle-db
official.description: One explicit-SQL API over SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL — portable placeholders, a uniform Row, checksum-tracked migrations, and the DatabaseLike contract other plugins build on.

official.name: pyxle-auth
official.description: Email + password accounts on argon2id — sliding sessions, password-reset and verification flows, wildcard RBAC, scoped API tokens, and request guards. Fail-secure by default.
